name: ai-test-automation-agent
description: AI Test Automation Agent — React + Node.js + Playwright + Cucumber + Allure + OpenAI

scripts.predev:backend: node -e "try{const e=require('child_process').execSync('netstat -ano | findstr :4000',{encoding:'utf8',stdio:['pipe','pipe','ignore']});const p=[...new Set(e.split('\n').map(l=>l.trim().split(/\s+/).pop()).filter(p=>p&&/^\d+$/.test(p)&&p!=='0'))];p.forEach(pid=>{try{require('child_process').execSync('taskkill /F /PID '+pid,{stdio:'ignore'})}catch(e){}});console.log('[predev] Port 4000 cleared')}catch(e){console.log('[predev] Port 4000 was free')}"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../automation && npm install
